content:
感謝各位守密人的支持！
《忘卻前夜》OST：珊EP·石化藝術，今日發佈～歡迎大家收聽、下載及分享～如果有基於OST的二次創作，也歡迎分享給我們！ （二創請遵照同人規則，OST內容請勿商用）

忘卻前夜OST：珊EP·石化藝術
她答應過你，一定會帶你一起回家。
——以恆久的姿態，回到靜謐的、奇蹟和美的家鄉。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
規劃：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST："Sanga EP·Art of Corallization "was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

Morimens OST："Sanga EP·Art of Corallization"
She promised to take you home. Together.
—In eternal form, to that quiet homeland of miracles and beauty.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio

Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
